description: 镜头语法库 + Motion Prompt 集成版
generation_method: 基于 pkg/shotgrammar 规则匹配 + pkg/motionprompt 引擎生成，每场独立匹配最佳 ShotRule + EmotionProfile

scenes.title: 沉默的等待
scenes.matched_emotion_profile: 平静[0] — serene stillness with gentle ambient motion
scenes.motion_hint: macro detail shot with ambient motion (rain drops, dust particles)
scenes.action: 林晓坐在沙发上，手里握着一杯已经凉了的咖啡，目光空洞地看着前方
scenes.result: 咖啡杯表面微微泛起涟漪，映出电视的冷光——暗示主人公内心的微澜
scenes.atmosphere: 深夜客厅，只有电视的微光，空气中弥漫着凉透的咖啡气息
scenes.sound_effect: 时钟滴答声，电视低频杂音
scenes.image_prompt: Extreme close-up of a cold coffee cup on a dark living room table, TV light reflecting on the liquid surface creating subtle ripples, shallow depth of field, muted cool tones with warm TV glow, melancholic stillness, cinematic lighting from screen only, anime style
scenes.video_prompt: [Camera] extreme close-up (ECU), eye-level angle, locked-off static camera | [Motion] serene stillness with gentle ambient motion | [Action] coffee surface with micro-ripples from subtle hand tremor, TV light flickering across liquid | [Environment] 客厅内, 深夜, 只有电视微光的昏暗空间 | [Pacing] 0.5x-0.8x speed, lingering | [Audio] SFX: 时钟滴答声，电视低频杂音 | [Result] 咖啡杯表面微微泛起涟漪，映出电视的冷光 | [Ratio] 16:9
scenes.self_eval: vs版本A：从普通中景升级为环境细节特写（ECU），用咖啡杯涟漪这个微观细节建立氛围，比直接拍人坐沙发更有电影感。Motion Prompt 描述了具体的视觉动态（micro-ripples, TV light flickering），而非简单的 'Action: 坐在沙发上'。image_prompt 包含了构图、光影、景深描述。

scenes.title: 电话响起
scenes.matched_rule: turning_point[0] — 关键道具/表情特写
scenes.matched_emotion_profile: 紧张[1] — steady with subtle unease in framing
scenes.motion_hint: sharp focus on key detail with shallow depth of field
scenes.action: 手机突然震动，屏幕亮起'陈默'两个字，林晓的手微微颤抖
scenes.result: 手机屏幕在黑暗中骤然亮起，来电显示刺眼清晰，手指在屏幕边缘微微颤抖
scenes.atmosphere: 突然的震动打破寂静，光线从暖色骤变为手机屏幕的冷白光
scenes.sound_effect: 手机震动声（由远及近），玻璃桌面共振
scenes.image_prompt: Extreme close-up of a smartphone screen lighting up in darkness showing caller name '陈默', fingers trembling at screen edge, sharp focus on screen with blurred dark background, cold white phone light cutting through warm TV ambience, high contrast, shallow depth of field, anime style
scenes.video_prompt: [Camera] extreme close-up (ECU), eye-level angle, locked-off static camera, with dramatic intensity | [Motion] steady with subtle unease in framing | [Action] phone screen suddenly illuminates in darkness, vibration causes micro-movement, fingers at edge tremble with subtle 不安 | [Environment] 客厅内·茶几, 深夜, 光线从暖色骤变为冷白光 | [Pacing] rapid acceleration, snap movement | [Audio] SFX: 手机震动声由远及近，玻璃桌面共振 | [Result] 手机屏幕在黑暗中骤然亮起，来电显示刺眼清晰 | [Ratio] 16:9
scenes.self_eval: vs版本A：从近景俯视推镜升级为ECU固定特写+burst节奏。turning_point规则精准匹配——手机亮起就是'关键道具特写'。smash_cut转场从上一场的dissolve骤然切入，制造惊吓感。Motion Prompt 描述了光线变化（warm→cold white）和微动态（vibration, tremble），版本A只有 'Camera movement: 推镜'。

scenes.title: 犹豫接听
scenes.matched_emotion_profile: 紧张[2] — tense handheld with slight tremor
scenes.motion_hint: slow creep in during emotional dialogue
scenes.action: 林晓深吸一口气，闭上眼睛，最终按下了接听键
scenes.result: 从面部中景缓缓推进到眼部特写，捕捉闭眼→睁眼→决定的微表情变化
scenes.atmosphere: 电话铃声持续响着，空气凝固，时间仿佛被拉长
scenes.sound_effect: 持续的手机铃声，深呼吸声，接听键按下的轻微咔嗒
scenes.image_prompt: Close-up of a young woman's face in dim TV light, eyes closed in hesitation, phone held near ear, tense expression with furrowed brow, shallow depth of field focusing on eyelashes and lips, cool blue-grey tones with phone screen glow on cheek, emotional tension visible in jaw muscles, anime style
scenes.video_prompt: [Camera] close-up (CU), eye-level angle, dolly push in toward subject, with deliberate emphasis | [Motion] tense handheld with slight tremor | [Action] deep breath, eyes close then slowly open, finger presses answer button, with visible 紧张 | [Environment] 客厅内, 深夜, 空气凝固时间被拉长 | [Pacing] 1.2x-1.5x speed, energetic | [Audio] SFX: 持续铃声，深呼吸声，接听键咔嗒 | [Result] 从面部缓缓推进到眼部特写，捕捉闭眼→睁眼→决定的微表情 | [Ratio] 16:9
scenes.self_eval: vs版本A：从特写固定镜头升级为CU慢推（slow creep in）。dialogue规则的'情绪递进对话'完美匹配犹豫→接听的心理过程。Motion Prompt 加入了 'tense handheld with slight tremor'——摄影机本身带有紧张感的微颤，这是版本A完全没有的摄影机情绪表达。push_in 的速度被描述为 'slow creep'，体现犹豫的节奏。

scenes.title: 争吵爆发
scenes.matched_emotion_profile: 愤怒[3] — aggressive push in with sharp focus, explosive energy
scenes.motion_hint: intense push in to eyes/face capturing raw emotion
scenes.action: 林晓猛地站起来，声音越来越大，眼眶泛红，手紧紧攥着手机
scenes.result: 怼脸大特写——从下方仰视，捕捉泛红的眼眶、咬紧的牙关、颤抖的嘴唇
scenes.dialogue: 你现在才想起来打电话？三个月了！
scenes.atmosphere: 情绪急剧升温，画面从冷色调骤变为暖红色调，空间压迫感极强
scenes.sound_effect: 站起时沙发弹簧声，手机外壳被攥紧的吱嘎声
scenes.image_prompt: Extreme close-up from low angle looking up at a woman's face in fury, red-rimmed eyes glistening with unshed tears, clenched jaw, lips trembling with rage, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting with warm red undertones, phone gripped white-knuckled at edge of frame, intense emotional peak, shallow depth of field on eyes, anime style
scenes.video_prompt: [Camera] extreme close-up (ECU), low angle (looking up), dolly push in toward subject, with dramatic intensity | [Motion] aggressive push in with sharp focus, explosive energy | [Action] 猛地站起，声音越来越大，眼眶泛红，手紧紧攥着手机, with intense 愤怒 | [Environment] 客厅内, 深夜, 画面从冷色调骤变为暖红色调 | [Pacing] rapid acceleration, snap movement | [Audio] SFX: 沙发弹簧声，手机外壳被攥紧的吱嘎声 | [Result] 怼脸大特写——仰视捕捉泛红眼眶、咬紧牙关、颤抖嘴唇 | [Ratio] 16:9
scenes.self_eval: vs版本A：这是最大的差异点。版本A用中景跟镜，版本B用ECU低角度急推——这就是栋少说的'怼脸大镜头'。emotional_peak规则 + 愤怒[3]的EmotionProfile共同驱动：ECU景别、low_angle仰视（力量感）、push_in急推（压迫感）、burst节奏。Motion Prompt 的 'aggressive push in with sharp focus, explosive energy' 精准描述了愤怒爆发的摄影机行为，版本A只有 'Camera movement: 跟镜'。smash_cut转场制造冲击。

scenes.title: 情绪崩溃
scenes.matched_emotion_profile: 悲伤[3] — lingering close-up with slow fade, heavy atmosphere
scenes.motion_hint: slow pull out leaving character isolated in frame
scenes.action: 林晓的声音突然哽咽，她慢慢蹲下来，靠着沙发，泪水无声地流下
scenes.result: 俯视拉远——女人蜷缩在沙发旁的身影越来越小，被昏暗的客厅吞没
scenes.atmosphere: 从上一场的暴烈骤然转为死寂，只有抽泣声在空旷的客厅回荡
scenes.sound_effect: 抽泣声，身体滑落靠在沙发上的摩擦声
scenes.image_prompt: High angle medium shot looking down at a woman crumpled beside a sofa in a dark living room, tears streaming silently, body curled inward, isolated in vast dark space, overhead perspective emphasizing vulnerability and loneliness, muted desaturated tones, single dim light source from TV, heavy melancholic atmosphere, anime style
scenes.video_prompt: [Camera] medium shot (MS), high angle (looking down), dolly pull back from subject, with dramatic intensity | [Motion] lingering close-up with slow fade, heavy atmosphere | [Action] 声音突然哽咽，慢慢蹲下来，靠着沙发，泪水无声地流下, with intense 悲伤 | [Environment] 客厅内·沙发旁, 深夜, 从暴烈骤然转为死寂 | [Pacing] 0.5x-0.8x speed, lingering | [Audio] SFX: 抽泣声，身体滑落靠在沙发上的摩擦声 | [Result] 俯视拉远——蜷缩身影越来越小，被昏暗客厅吞没 | [Ratio] 16:9
scenes.self_eval: vs版本A：从近景俯视推镜变为中景俯视拉镜——方向完全反转。emotional_peak[2]的'孤独感渲染'规则驱动了pull_out运镜，让人物在画面中越来越小，视觉上强化孤独感。时长从7秒增加到8秒（slow节奏），这就是栋少说的'长镜头留白'。dissolve转场（而非版本A的无转场）让从愤怒到悲伤的过渡更柔和。Motion Prompt 的 'lingering' 和 '0.5x-0.8x speed' 精准控制了留白节奏。

scenes.title: 决断挂断
scenes.matched_rule: turning_point[0] — 关键道具/表情特写
scenes.matched_emotion_profile: 坚定[2] — strong low angle with steady resolve
scenes.motion_hint: sharp focus on key detail with shallow depth of field
scenes.action: 林晓擦了擦眼泪，深呼吸，声音恢复平静，果断挂断电话
scenes.result: 低角度仰视特写——擦干泪痕的脸庞，眼神从迷茫变为坚定，手指果断按下挂断
scenes.atmosphere: 情绪从崩溃中收束，空气开始流动，画面色调从冷灰转为中性
scenes.sound_effect: 挂断电话的嘟嘟声，随后的寂静
scenes.image_prompt: Extreme close-up from low angle of a woman's face with dried tear tracks, eyes now clear and determined, jaw set with resolve, finger pressing end-call button in foreground with shallow depth of field, transitioning from cold grey to neutral warm tones, strength emerging from vulnerability, anime style
scenes.video_prompt: [Camera] extreme close-up (ECU), low angle (looking up), locked-off static camera, with deliberate emphasis | [Motion] strong low angle with steady resolve | [Action] 擦干眼泪，深呼吸，声音恢复平静，果断挂断电话, with visible 坚定 | [Environment] 客厅内, 深夜, 色调从冷灰转为中性 | [Pacing] rapid acceleration, snap movement | [Audio] SFX: 挂断电话嘟嘟声，随后寂静 | [Result] 低角度仰视——眼神从迷茫变为坚定，手指果断按下挂断 | [Ratio] 16:9
scenes.self_eval: vs版本A：从特写平视固定升级为ECU低角度固定。turning_point规则匹配'决断'这个反转时刻，low_angle来自坚定[2]的EmotionProfile——仰视赋予人物力量感和尊严感，这是版本A平视镜头完全没有的。smash_cut从上一场的dissolve骤然切入，制造'收束'的果断感。Motion Prompt 的 'strong low angle with steady resolve' 精准传达了坚定情绪。

scenes.title: 窗前释然
scenes.matched_emotion_profile: 平静[0] — serene stillness with gentle ambient motion
scenes.motion_hint: slow pull out and rise as character diminishes
scenes.action: 林晓走到窗前，推开窗户，望着远处的灯火，嘴角微微上扬
scenes.result: 摄影机缓缓上升后拉——从窗前的女人背影，逐渐拉远到城市夜景全貌，人物融入灯火
scenes.atmosphere: 夜风吹过，窗帘轻轻飘动，城市灯火温暖而遥远
scenes.sound_effect: 窗户推开声，夜风声，远处城市的低频环境音
scenes.image_prompt: Medium shot from slightly high angle of a woman standing at an open window, back to camera, city lights stretching to horizon, curtains gently billowing in night breeze, warm amber city glow contrasting cool interior, peaceful silhouette against urban landscape, sense of release and new beginning, anime style
scenes.video_prompt: [Camera] medium shot (MS), high angle (looking down), dolly pull back from subject, with gentle easing | [Motion] serene stillness with gentle ambient motion | [Action] 走到窗前，推开窗户，望着远处灯火，嘴角微微上扬 | [Environment] 客厅内·窗前, 深夜, 夜风吹过窗帘轻轻飘动 | [Pacing] 0.5x-0.8x speed, lingering | [Audio] SFX: 窗户推开声，夜风声，远处城市低频环境音 | [Result] 摄影机缓缓上升后拉——从窗前背影拉远到城市夜景全貌 | [Ratio] 16:9
scenes.self_eval: vs版本A：从远景平视拉镜升级为中景高角度上升拉镜。departure规则的'渐行渐远'驱动了pull_out+high_angle的组合——摄影机上升后拉，让人物逐渐融入城市夜景，视觉上完成'释然'的情绪表达。fade转场收束全片。时长7秒+slow节奏，给观众留白空间。Motion Prompt 的 'slow pull out and rise as character diminishes' 精准描述了这个经典的结尾运镜。

vs_version_a_improvements: 镜头选择基于规则库而非随意指定——每场都有明确的叙事意图（establish/turning_point/dialogue/emotional_peak/departure）
Motion Prompt 从 Key:Value 平铺升级为结构化的 [Camera][Motion][Action][Environment][Pacing][Audio][Result] 格式
摄影机行为有了情绪表达——紧张时微颤(tremor)、愤怒时急推(aggressive push in)、悲伤时缓拉(lingering pull out)
第4场（愤怒爆发）从中景跟镜升级为ECU低角度急推——实现了'怼脸大镜头'
第5场（崩溃）从推镜变为拉镜+长时长——实现了'长镜头留白'
转场方式有了编排——dissolve用于氛围过渡，smash_cut用于情绪冲击，fade用于收束
image_prompt 从简单拼接升级为包含构图、光影、景深、色调的专业描述
音效描述更具体——从无到有，每场都有环境音设计
remaining_gaps: 7场戏仍然各自独立生成，没有跨镜头的情绪弧线编排
BGM 仍然缺失——没有音乐层的情绪渲染
节奏倍率(pacing)是规则库静态值，没有根据整体弧线动态调整
第4→5场的情绪转折（愤怒→悲伤）虽然转场用了dissolve，但缺少'静默留白'的刻意设计
时长调整是手动的，没有引擎自动根据情绪强度调整
